title: justicia pedunculosa
intro: Justicia pedunculosa, also known as the Mexican honeysuckle or Mexican gold, is a plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia pedunculosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from various types of pain. Herbal preparations of Justicia pedunculosa can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
